programmes.show_name: We Still Steal the Old Way
programmes.show_description: Crime drama sequel with Ian Ogilvy. After a daring heist puts them away in Britain's toughest prison, an aging criminal outfit encounters a nemesis intent on settling an old score. (2016)
Fast-paced action thriller with Craig Fairbrass. When the Russian mob kidnaps the daughter of a Leeds gangster, he asks an old friend from his SAS days to bring them down and bring her home. (2010)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Monstrous marine mayhem. Following a tsunami, Malibu is flooded and a ferocious pack of prehistoric goblin sharks appear from the murky depths to hunt for their next bikini-clad meal. (2009)

Posing as part of a touring football squad, the team go behind the Iron Curtain to free an East German scientist who wants to defect to the West. S5, Ep4
The outbreak of a revolution interferes with the gang's plans to rescue three American agents from a Third World country. S5, Ep5
General Stockwell orders the team to steal a Soviet stealth fighter-jet, but is then is kidnapped by a spy who plans to torture him for information. S5, Ep6
Face plans to leave the A-Team, but agrees to help a beautiful reporter save the life of a future president of the National Brotherhood of Labour Unions. S5, Ep7
An attempt to smuggle a crooked politician into the country gets complicated when the man turns out to be Face's long-lost father. S5, Ep8
Fact-based WWII spy adventure with Christopher Plummer. Bank robber Eddie Chapman is recruited by the Nazis, and then becomes a British double agent in exchange for money and a full pardon. (1967)
Tentacled terror starring horror icon Peter Cushing. Following a spate of grisly deaths, a scientist travels to a remote island where he discovers deadly tentacled monsters are taking over. (1966)

programmes.show_name: The Fabulous Journey To The Centre of the Earth
programmes.show_description: Adventure based on the Jules Verne classic. A scientist leads an expedition under the Earth's surface, discovering a prehistoric land inhabited by strange creatures. (1976)
In a post-apocalyptic settlement, an old man in a cave offers guidance to survivors, but their orderly world is shattered by the arrival of four soldiers. S5, Ep7
A wealthy and cantankerous old inventor manages to make life difficult for his greedy niece even after he dies. S5, Ep8
Thriller with Michael Caine. A journalist and his son go in search of a band of modern-day pirates preying on luxury yachts in the Caribbean, but end up kidnapped and forced to join the crew. (1980)
Sci-fi thriller with James Caan. After a race of aliens fleeing slavery seeks shelter on Earth, one of them becomes a cop, and is paired with a bigoted human partner to investigate a murder. (1988)
Heart-pounding thriller with Mel Gibson. A veteran bomb squad officer races against time - and a ticking explosive device - to save an IT technician taken hostage by a terrorist mastermind. (2022)
Crime thriller with Geoff Bell. A gang of crooks plan to steal millions of pounds from a London exchange bank, but things go horribly wrong and the thieves are forced to take hostages. (2008)

Vincent takes an unconscious Invader to a doctor who produces a revealing X-ray scan of the alien. However, the invaders are determined to obtain the X-ray.
Thriller based on true events. It's a toss-up between teeth and the tide when three kayakers find themselves trapped on a small sinking island, stalked by a shark. (2020)

Fast-paced drama with Jack Palance. A group of people, including a pilot, a Frenchwoman and a female FBI agent, hunt for a cache of money hidden in the wreckage of a crashed plane. (1953)
Medieval drama with Charlton Heston. When an 11th-century knight falls for another man's wife, her vengeful spouse ignites a civil war by influencing the knight's brother to turn against him. (1965)
Kirk, Spock and McCoy become slaves on the planet Platonius, where the people are governed by mind-controlling aliens who aim to manipulate the Enterprise crew. S3, Ep10/24

Brutal crime thriller starring Gerard Butler. A man takes justice into his own hands and begins a campaign of vigilante violence after a plea bargain sets one of his family's killers free. (2009)
Tense thriller with Josh Hartnett. An unfortunate case of mistaken identity leaves an ordinary man with the task of paying off a debt to an underworld kingpin by assassinating a rival mobster. (2005)
